---
title: "History of France"
sort_title: "History of France"
slug: "History of France"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---




[Click here for online text of this book available from Gutenberg](http://www.gutenberg.org/files/17287/17287-h/17287-h.htm)

This book is part of the series of History Primers edited by John Richard Green.
